description: Design a testable hypothesis with variables, success criteria, measurement plan, and debrief template — turn analysis into action
usage: experiment, hypothesis, test, validate, prove, try, micro-experiment, test idea

target.description: The claim, assumption, or idea to test

scope.description: Experiment scale: micro (1-2 weeks, low cost), standard (1-2 months), ambitious (quarter+)

constraints.description: Known constraints — budget, time, team size, tools available
